---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new CLI feature or UX improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

What are you trying to do? What does the CLI not let you do today?

## Proposed solution

How would you like the CLI to behave? Include the proposed command shape and output if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you discard them?

## Spec implications

Does this require a change to the LLMO specification? If yes, the change goes through LIP-1 at the `openllmo/llmo.org` repository before landing here. If no, the CLI can absorb this independently.
